CustomField.description: Indicates how many days off of when the Drip Campaign is applied to the Lead/Contact for scheduling, i.e. the code uses TODAY() = Days_Offset to set the day that the SMS will go out plus the Time_Of_Day field.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Indicates how many days from the date the Drip Campaign is applied that the message will be sent.
CustomField.label: Days Offset
